description: May tracks Amador to her hotel room, where a tense standoff ensues. Amador, terrified of her handler’s kill switch, fights May in a darkened room. Just as the conflict escalates, Coulson tranquilizes Amador, preventing either agent from being killed.

transcript.line: Whoever's monitoring you, do they have audio?
No. But they'll use facial recognition to determine you're a S.H.I.E.L.D. agent.
So I don't have to introduce myself.
No. He feels sorry for you. I don't. I'm bringing you into S.H.I.E.L.D., you'll get a fair trial, and no one else gets hurt.
You have no idea, do you?
We know that you receive orders.
Then you know that once they see you, only one of us gets to walk out of here. They built in a fail-safe. Either I kill you... or they kill me.
You should have stayed in bed.
